/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -miphoneos-version-min=15.0 -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/zlib_example.dir/example.c.o -o zlib_example.app/zlib_example  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ombhardwaj/Development/projects/aiotool/imagecore/packages/core/build-ios/zlib-ext-prefix/src/zlib-ext-build ../libz.1.3.2.1.dylib
